hyperedges.label: Single favicon composition: gradient disc plus white note glyph defines Music Bot visual identity
Logging and analytics hooks: logger helpers + DB/stats recording + UI error paths
Protecting YouTube/yt-dlp path from overload: breaker + pooled extractions + rate limits
Persistent state: SQLite authoritative for stats/settings/history rows; JSON files for autoplay recent tracks + dashboard action queue; legal docs omit SQLite
Optional cloud LLM persona layered on bot UX; depends on API key and google-genai
Operations story: Docker guide + dashboard port + landing invite funnel

nodes.label: Discord bot process
nodes.notes: MusicBot lifecycle, background tasks, voice events, dynamic prefix, help embed, remote-action polling.

nodes.label: Root BotConfig
nodes.notes: Env-backed dataclass: audio/autoplay/resource limits, ffmpeg/ydl presets, quality tiers.

nodes.label: Flask-SocketIO dashboard
nodes.notes: Gevent stack; stats API/WS; PIN-gated remote control; separate from uvloop bot container.

nodes.label: SongCache
nodes.notes: Thread-safe TTL cache for yt-dlp resolutions; periodic expire sweep from bot.

nodes.label: AudioManager
nodes.notes: Per-guild queues, playback prep, Spotify→lazy tracks, concurrency semaphore, prefetch, autoplay hooks, idle/alone timers.

nodes.label: YouTube recommendation engine
nodes.notes: ytmusicapi watch playlist with yt-dlp fallback; in-memory LRU-ish cache.

nodes.label: audio package export
nodes.notes: Re-exports AudioManager, Song, audio_manager singleton.

nodes.label: MusicCog + playback orchestration
nodes.notes: User commands; smart search scoring; playlist batching; play_current_song/handle_song_end/autoplay buffering.

nodes.label: AdminCog
nodes.notes: Guild prefix/quality DB writes, stats embeds, queue/voice admin, owner broadcast/servers.

nodes.label: commands package
nodes.notes: Intentionally minimal; cogs loaded via load_extension.

nodes.label: Browser music Flask app
nodes.notes: REST for search, queue, control, MP3 stream endpoint; JIT URL resolve.

nodes.label: Web Config
nodes.notes: Distinct Config class from root; PORT/DEBUG, ffmpeg/ydl for web extraction.

nodes.label: AudioProvider
nodes.notes: ytmusicapi search; yt-dlp URL resolution; watch-playlist recommendations.

nodes.label: QueueManager singleton
nodes.notes: Global queue + index; shuffle/repeat/jump/play_now.

nodes.label: Recommender
nodes.notes: Thin wrapper over AudioProvider.get_recommendations for autoplay API.

nodes.label: AudioStreamer
nodes.notes: FFmpeg subprocess piping MP3 chunks for browser /api/stream.

nodes.label: yt-dlp smoke script
nodes.notes: One-off AudioProvider.get_audio_url check.

nodes.label: Web player UI
nodes.notes: Fetches APIs, HTMLAudio /api/stream, seek via query param, client-side autoplay at queue end.

nodes.label: AI brain manual test
nodes.notes: Async scenarios for ai_brain.get_response parity with cog messaging hooks.

nodes.label: Recommendation engine manual test
nodes.notes: Async smoke for YouTubeMusicRecommendationEngine.get_related_songs.

nodes.label: Docker/Compose deployment: prerequisites, .env (DISCORD_TOKEN required; Spotify optional), volumes bot-logs/bot-stats/bot-cache, dashboard on :5000, resource limits, backup/restore, troubleshooting (FFmpeg, yt-dlp, DNS).
nodes.norm_label: docker/compose deployment: prerequisites, .env (discord_token required; spotify optional), volumes bot-logs/bot-stats/bot-cache, dashboard on :5000, resource limits, backup/restore, troubleshooting (ffmpeg, yt-dlp, dns).

nodes.label: Privacy (2026-02-09): collects Discord user/guild/voice IDs, search queries, commands; uses data for playback, queue, autoplay recommendations (titles), permissions; claims mostly RAM/ephemeral; persistent listening history described as localized JSON (not user-behavior tracking); third parties Discord/YouTube/Spotify; no sale of data. NOTE: codebase also persists SQLite stats/settings (doc drift).
nodes.norm_label: privacy (2026-02-09): collects discord user/guild/voice ids, search queries, commands; uses data for playback, queue, autoplay recommendations (titles), permissions; claims mostly ram/ephemeral; persistent listening history described as localized json (not user-behavior tracking); third parties discord/youtube/spotify; no sale of data. note: codebase also persists sqlite stats/settings (doc drift).

nodes.label: Product README: 2026 Pro Edition — gapless playback, SQLite via aiosqlite+WAL, uvloop, concurrency semaphores, smart search, per-server quality tiers, TTL cache; AI/autoplay/recommend features; Docker-first; web dashboard :5000 with metrics + remote command queue for owners; command tables for prefix/quality/stats.
nodes.norm_label: product readme: 2026 pro edition — gapless playback, sqlite via aiosqlite+wal, uvloop, concurrency semaphores, smart search, per-server quality tiers, ttl cache; ai/autoplay/recommend features; docker-first; web dashboard :5000 with metrics + remote command queue for owners; command tables for prefix/quality/stats.

nodes.label: Terms (2026-02-09): license for intended music use; prohibits illegal use, exploitation, spam/overload, ToS-violating streams; minimal IDs + local listening history titles for autoplay; claims no permanent DB (doc drift vs SQLite); as-is; third-party dependency disclaimer; termination right; contact developer.
nodes.norm_label: terms (2026-02-09): license for intended music use; prohibits illegal use, exploitation, spam/overload, tos-violating streams; minimal ids + local listening history titles for autoplay; claims no permanent db (doc drift vs sqlite); as-is; third-party dependency disclaimer; termination right; contact developer.

nodes.label: Landing page docs: static HTML/CSS marketing site; deploy via GitHub Pages/Vercel/Netlify/local; customization (gradients, bot name, OAuth invite URL); optional GA; UTM on invite links; support links.
nodes.norm_label: landing page docs: static html/css marketing site; deploy via github pages/vercel/netlify/local; customization (gradients, bot name, oauth invite url); optional ga; utm on invite links; support links.

nodes.label: robots.txt: Allow all user-agents; sitemap URL points to Netlify-hosted sitemap.
nodes.norm_label: robots.txt: allow all user-agents; sitemap url points to netlify-hosted sitemap.

nodes.label: Root Python deps: discord.py[voice], yt-dlp, ytmusicapi, aiohttp, uvloop, aiosqlite, cachetools, python-dotenv, google-genai (optional AI), spotipy, Flask+SocketIO+gevent stack, psutil, requests, pytest/black/flake8 dev.
nodes.norm_label: root python deps: discord.py[voice], yt-dlp, ytmusicapi, aiohttp, uvloop, aiosqlite, cachetools, python-dotenv, google-genai (optional ai), spotipy, flask+socketio+gevent stack, psutil, requests, pytest/black/flake8 dev.

nodes.label: Separate web app bundle: Flask 3, yt-dlp, ytmusicapi, gunicorn (lighter than root dashboard stack).
nodes.norm_label: separate web app bundle: flask 3, yt-dlp, ytmusicapi, gunicorn (lighter than root dashboard stack).

hyperedges.label: Single favicon composition: gradient disc plus white note glyph defines Music Bot visual identity
Logging and analytics hooks: logger helpers + DB/stats recording + UI error paths
Protecting YouTube/yt-dlp path from overload: breaker + pooled extractions + rate limits
Persistent state: SQLite authoritative for stats/settings/history rows; JSON files for autoplay recent tracks + dashboard action queue; legal docs omit SQLite
Optional cloud LLM persona layered on bot UX; depends on API key and google-genai
Operations story: Docker guide + dashboard port + landing invite funnel
